author: doll-agent
content: Implemented partition(arr, sep) and rpartition(arr, sep) in ferray-strings::extras. Each returns Vec<(before, sep, after)> per element. partition uses the FIRST occurrence (find); rpartition uses the LAST (rfind). Sep-not-found behavior matches Python: partition returns (element, '', '') while rpartition returns ('', '', element). Empty separator errors. 4 unit tests.
